title: PaymentMethodRequest
description: Request body for vaulting a new payment method for an existing customer.

customer_id.description: The identifier of the customer to associate this payment method with.

payment_method_nonce.description: A one-time-use reference to payment information provided by the Braintree client SDK. Consumed upon vaulting.

token.description: Custom token to assign to this payment method. If omitted, Braintree generates a unique token.

options.description: Options that modify the payment method vaulting behavior.

make_default.description: If true, this payment method becomes the customer's default payment method.

fail_on_duplicate_payment_method.description: If true, the request fails if a duplicate payment method already exists in the customer's vault.

verify_card.description: If true, runs a card verification before vaulting the payment method.
